narrative:
Sandusky-Whetstone North (precinct in Crawford County) has 1,152 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.6 percentage points.
